steps.name: git-configurer
steps.note: configured user.name=Jane Doe and user.email from basic_info.json; git 2.50.1

steps.name: github-ssh-configurer
steps.note: Reused existing ed25519 key; authenticated with PAT; key uploaded to GitHub; ssh -T git@github.com verified successfully

steps.name: editor-installer
steps.note: VS Code already-present (code 1.123.0); Cursor installed via cask (cursor 3.7.36); both CLIs on PATH at /opt/homebrew/bin

steps.name: postgres-installer
steps.note: postgresql@16 (16.14) installed, PATH set, service started (listening on port 5433; 5432 occupied by another postgres instance), connection verified

steps.name: rbenv-installer
steps.note: rbenv 1.3.2 installed via Homebrew; ruby-build 20260616 installed; eval "$(rbenv init - zsh)" added to ~/.zshrc; all verification checks passed

steps.name: aws-vpn-installer
steps.note: AWS VPN Client installed via pkg installer; Pattern profile already present; app opened

steps.name: git-cloner
steps.note: config.yaml contains only placeholder values (org: your-org-name, repos: repo-name-1/2/3); no real repos were cloned; update config.yaml with the actual GitHub org and repo names, then re-run git-cloner
